name: CLX - Sentinel Cost Anomaly Detect v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Cron 07:00 daily (after 06:00 collectors). Compares yesterday's spend per service to a 14-day baseline. Raises a warning alert if yesterday > 2x baseline (rule of thumb — tune after 30 days of data).

parameters.jsCode:
const anomalies = $input.item.json.anomalies || [];
return anomalies.map(function (a) { return { json: { severity: 'warning', alert_type: 'cost_anomaly', title: '[' + a.service + '] yesterday spent ' + a.ratio + 'x the 14-day baseline', message: 'Yesterday $' + (a.yesterday_cents/100).toFixed(2) + ' vs baseline $' + (a.baseline_avg_cents/100).toFixed(2) + '/day. Investigate before threshold check fires.', aggregation_key: 'cost_anomaly:' + a.service + ':' + new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10), details: a } }; });

const r = $('Detect').first().json;
return { json: { ok: true, services_evaluated: r.services_evaluated, anomalies_detected: (r.anomalies || []).length } };
